current_recommendation.thought_process: The outfit must be stylish and weather-appropriate for a rainy date. Given the constraints of a 'Straight Type' body and 'Warm and Bright' color guidelines, I focused on structured, tailored pieces with light, warm tones. The 'Effortlessly Styled' vibe is achieved with simple, clean lines and an elegant touch.

outfit_options.name: Rainy Day Chic
outfit_options.description: This look combines practicality with style, perfect for a rainy day date. The beige trench coat adds a classic, weather-resistant layer, while the mint green blouse introduces a light, warm color. Straight-leg jeans maintain a relaxed but structured silhouette.
